'''âf-z-b-sh''' ('''kafazbeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulgarize|vulgarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulgarize|vulgarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-z-b-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kafazbeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifazbeshoko|thifazbeshoko]] || [[word:jifazbeshoko|jifazbeshoko]] || [[word:shifazbeshoko|shifazbeshoko]] || [[word:kifazbeshoko|kifazbeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufazbeshoko|thuthufazbeshoko]] || [[word:jujufazbeshoko|jujufazbeshoko]] || [[word:shushufazbeshoko|shushufazbeshoko]] || [[word:kukufazbeshoko|kukufazbeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
